title: PhD in strategy and entrepreneurship
content:
Hi everyone,


We had a brief conversation in class about the academic career path and pursuing a PhD. For those interested in learning more, I attached the flyer for our Strategy and Entrepreneurship doctoral program. The deadline for the application is December 15.


Have a legendary weekend,
Sina
